turns.name: WILLIAM H. REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinion of the Court No. 91-1010, Puerto Rico Aqueduct and Sewer Authority versus Metcalf & Eddy, Inc. will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: BYRON R. WHITE
turns.text: For the reasons stated in an opinion on file with the Clerk, the judgment of the Court of Appeals for the First Circuit is reversed and the case is remanded for further proceedings. Justice Blackmun has filed a concurring opinion; Justice Stevens has filed the dissenting opinion.
